query:
SELECT 
  c.title as trilha,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as total_aulas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.video_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aulas_com_video,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(l.content, '')) > 2000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aulas_expandidas_2k,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(l.content, '')) > 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aulas_expandidas_5k,
  ROUND(AVG(CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(l.content, '')))) as media_caracteres
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN modules m ON c.id = m.course_id
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
WHERE l.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.title
ORDER BY c.created_at ASC;
